task: Fix the OSS homepage flashing status indicator by removing the continuous pulse animation from the keyless local alpha header while preserving status copy and product behavior.
securityRequirements: Do not add credential fields, provider key entry, auth token handling, provider execution, worker execution, billing mutation, or quota mutation.
Keep the OSS browser/API surface keyless.
dependencyRequirements: Do not add npm, Python, Rust, image, icon, font, or external asset dependencies.
performanceRequirements: Remove the continuous animation from the status indicator and do not add a replacement loop.
understandingRequirements: Explain that the observed flash was a continuous OSS homepage status-dot animation, not Pro code being mixed into the OSS repository.
continuityRequirements: Keep status text, analysis behavior, API behavior, and Pro files unchanged.
acknowledgedSkips: agent-guardrails plan inferred an over-broad bugfix scope including docs, backend, and pro target build artifacts, so this contract is manually narrowed to the actual OSS homepage animation fix.
patternSummary: The OSS homepage is a Next.js local alpha UI in frontend/src/app/page.tsx. This change preserves the existing inline style pattern and removes only the continuous status-dot animation.
smallestViableChange: Remove the status-dot pulse animation and delete the now-unused page-local keyframes.
assumptions: The user's reported flashing refers to the continuously blinking header status dot observed in the running OSS homepage.
Finite entry and string-draw animations are not the reported issue.
acceptanceCriteria: The OSS homepage status dot no longer has a continuous pulse animation.
The page keeps the same status text and keyless local alpha behavior.
No Pro, backend, API, provider, worker, quota, or billing behavior changes.
Browser smoke confirms there are no running infinite animations on the OSS homepage after initial load.
expectedBehaviorChanges: The small homepage status indicator becomes static instead of blinking.
expectedTestTargets: OSS homepage Playwright animation smoke on http://127.0.0.1:3005
agent-guardrails check --base-ref HEAD~1 --commands-run "npm --prefix frontend run lint; npm --prefix frontend run build; git diff --check"
nfrRequirements: Keep the change small and easy to review.
expectedConcurrencyImpact: None. This is a static style change.
observabilityRequirements: Evidence note must include the Playwright observation that the only continuous animation was the pulse on the header status span.
rollbackNotes: Revert the style removal in frontend/src/app/page.tsx and restore the page-local pulse keyframes.
